name: I have no witnesses to my warehouse fall - can I still get workers' comp?
description: Yes, medical records and your report can prove it.[9]

mainEntity.name: I have no witnesses to my warehouse fall - can I still get workers' comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical records and your report can prove it.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, your medical records, employer incident report, and consistent story often suffice without witnesses.** Many claims succeed on employee testimony alone.[1][9] Key factors: photos of hazard (e.g., wet floor); supervisor statements; video footage if available. Report immediately and get treated; avoid gaps in care. Build your case methodically for approval.[4]
